user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] System detected Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected for account Parnell Aerospace. Generating output.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-03 08:22 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Parnell Aerospace partner engagement

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with partner engagement. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
Date: 2024-02-19 14:52 EST
Subject: Follow-up: partner engagement Review

There's been a change in our timeline for partner engagement. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-20 12:02 EST
Subject: Follow-up: partner engagement Review

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about partner engagement. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: partner engagement Discussion - Parnell Aerospace
Date: 2024-02-27
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Christopher Martinez (Parnell Aerospace), Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft), Priya (Parnell Aerospace)

[00:01:15] Christopher Martinez (Parnell Aerospace): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is partner engagement.

[00:07:00] Christopher Martinez (Parnell Aerospace): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about technical validation. Can we address those?

[00:11:00] Christopher Martinez (Parnell Aerospace): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about performance requirements. Can we address those?

[00:13:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): On the partner engagement front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around cost optimization.

[00:17:00] Priya (Parnell Aerospace): Let me add some context -- we've been working on data residency and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.

[00:22:00] Priya (Parnell Aerospace): The timeline for cost optimization is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:27:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): On the partner engagement front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around data residency.
